name: arcam_sa20
description: ARCAM SA20 network control plugin for Volumio with persistent TCP control, system-status polling and play automation
author: MKlee333

volumio_info.details: Controls an ARCAM SA20 amplifier over the documented TCP protocol on port 50000. Uses a persistent TCP session, system-status polling, Volumio volume override and optional power/source/volume automation on Play.
volumio_info.changelog: 0.18.2 Align package metadata to Volumio store submission requirements.
